{{CargoRelic
|name=Fungus Warrior's Proof
|class_id=20271
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=A talent will be activated for the warriors who have this certificate: When you eat orange Fungi, the cap on additional Leadership Stats will be canceled! To hell with the 500-Orange-Fungi limit!
|fame=14
|art=15
|fth=30
|civ=13
|tech=18
|ss1=May the Fungi be with you!<br>Per 10 FTH-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +1<br>FTH-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss2=May the Fungi be with you!<br>Per 10 FTH-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +2<br>FTH-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss3=May the Fungi be with you!<br>Per 10 FTH-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>FTH-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss4=May the Fungi be with you!<br>Per 10 FTH-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>FTH-Fungi Eaten: 500/500
|ss7=May the Fungi be with you!<br>Per 10 FTH-Fungi eaten, Snail ATK +3<br>FTH-Fungi Eaten: 500/500<br> (Awakened)
}}
